from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

# Create a database engine
engine = create_engine('sqlite:///wheel_shop.db')

# Create a session maker
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)

# Create a base class for database models
Base = declarative_base()

# Define the Bicycle table
class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Integer)
    parts = relationship('Part', backref='bicycle')
    supplements = relationship('Supplement', backref='bicycle')

# Define the Part table
class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Integer)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

# Define the Supplement table
class Supplement(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'supplements'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Integer)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

# Create the tables in the database
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Create a session and perform CRUD operations
session = Session()

# Create a new bicycle
bicycle = Bicycle(model='Mountain Bike', brand='Trek', price=500)
session.add(bicycle)
session.commit()

# Add a part to the bicycle
part = Part(name='Rear Derailleur', price=50, bicycle=bicycle)
session.add(part)
session.commit()

# Add a supplement to the bicycle
supplement = Supplement(name='Bike Helmet', price=30, bicycle=bicycle)
session.add(supplement)
session.commit()

# Retrieve all bicycles
all_bicycles = session.query(Bicycle).all()
for b in all_bicycles:
    print(f"Model: {b.model}, Brand: {b.brand}, Price: {b.price}")

# Retrieve all parts for a specific bicycle
bicycle_parts = session.query(Part).filter_by(bicycle_id=bicycle.id).all()
for p in bicycle_parts:
    print(f"Part: {p.name}, Price: {p.price}")

# Update the price of a part
part.price = 60
session.commit()

# Delete a supplement
session.delete(supplement)
session.commit()

# Close the session
session.close()

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

# Connect to the database
engine = create_engine('sqlite:///wheel_shop.db')
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

# Create the database schema
Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    parts = relationship('Part', backref='bicycle')
    supplements = relationship('Supplement', backref='bicycle')

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

class Supplement(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'supplements'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

# Create the tables
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Insert data
bicycle1 = Bicycle(model='Mountain Bike', brand='Trek', price=500.0)
part1 = Part(name='Wheel', price=50.0, bicycle=bicycle1)
supplement1 = Supplement(name='Helmet', price=30.0, bicycle=bicycle1)

session.add_all([bicycle1, part1, supplement1])
session.commit()

# Increase the price of a part
part1.price = 55.0
session.commit()

# Remove a supplement
session.delete(supplement1)
session.commit()

# Update a bicycle
bicycle1.price = 550.0
session.commit()

# Filter and search
bicycles = session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.brand == 'Trek').all()
parts = session.query(Part).filter(Part.name.like('%Wheel%')).all()

# Close the session
session.close()

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Integer)

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_name = Column(String)
    total_price = Column(Integer)

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_id = Column(Integer)

import sqlalchemy as sa
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

# Create a new database engine
engine = sa.create_engine('sqlite:///cycle_store.db')

# Create a session for interacting with the database
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

# Define the Base class for declarative models
Base = declarative_base()

# Define the Cycle model
class Cycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'cycles'

    id = sa.Column(sa.Integer, primary_key=True)
    model = sa.Column(sa.String(50), nullable=False)
    brand = sa.Column(sa.String(50), nullable=False)
    price = sa.Column(sa.Float, nullable=False)
    stock = sa.Column(sa.Integer, nullable=False)

# Define the Accessory model
class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = sa.Column(sa.Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = sa.Column(sa.String(50), nullable=False)
    price = sa.Column(sa.Float, nullable=False)
    stock = sa.Column(sa.Integer, nullable=False)

# Create the tables in the database
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Insert data into the Cycle table
cycle1 = Cycle(model='Mountain Bike', brand='Trek', price=799.99, stock=10)
cycle2 = Cycle(model='Road Bike', brand='Specialized', price=1299.99, stock=8)
session.add_all([cycle1, cycle2])
session.commit()

# Insert data into the Accessory table
accessory1 = Accessory(name='Helmet', price=49.99, stock=20)
accessory2 = Accessory(name='Water Bottle Cage', price=9.99, stock=30)
session.add_all([accessory1, accessory2])
session.commit()

# Sum the total value of all cycles in stock
total_cycle_value = session.query(sa.func.sum(Cycle.price * Cycle.stock)).scalar()
print(f'Total value of all cycles in stock: {total_cycle_value}')

# Delete a cycle from the database
cycle_to_delete = session.query(Cycle).filter_by(model='Road Bike').first()
session.delete(cycle_to_delete)
session.commit()

# Update the price of an accessory
accessory_to_update = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(name='Helmet').first()
accessory_to_update.price = 54.99
session.commit()

# Filter and search for cycles
filtered_cycles = session.query(Cycle).filter(Cycle.brand == 'Trek').all()
for cycle in filtered_cycles:
    print(f'Model: {cycle.model}, Brand: {cycle.brand}, Price: {cycle.price}, Stock: {cycle.stock}')

# Close the session and engine
session.close()
engine.dispose()

class Bike(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bikes'
